Export reconciled data and tree to files

Source: R/reconcile_export.R
reconcile_export.Rd

Applies a reconciliation and writes the aligned dataset, pruned tree, and full mapping table to disk. This produces publication-ready files with a documented provenance trail.

Usage

reconcile_export(
  x,
  data = NULL,
  tree = NULL,
  species_col = NULL,
  dir = ".",
  prefix = "reconciled",
  tree_format = c("nexus", "newick"),
  drop_unresolved = TRUE
)

Arguments

x

A reconciliation object.

data

A data frame to align. If NULL, only the tree and mapping are written.

tree

An ape::phylo object or file path. If NULL, only the data and mapping are written.

species_col

Character(1). Column name in data containing species names. Auto-detected if NULL.

dir

Character(1). Output directory. Created if it does not exist. Default ".".

prefix

Character(1). File name prefix. Default "reconciled".

tree_format

Character(1). Tree output format: "nexus" (default) or "newick".

drop_unresolved

Logical. Drop unresolved species? Default TRUE.

Value

A named list of file paths (invisibly): $data, $tree, $mapping.

Examples

data(avonet_subset)
data(tree_jetz)
result <- reconcile_tree(avonet_subset, tree_jetz,
                         x_species = "Species1", authority = NULL)
#> ℹ Reconciling 919 data names vs 657 tree tips
#> ℹ Matching 919 x 657 names through 2 stages...
#> ℹ Stage 1/4: Exact matching...
#> ℹ Stage 2/4: Normalised matching (0 matched so far)...
#> ℹ Stage 3/4: Synonym resolution (657 matched so far)...
#> ℹ Stage 4/4: Fuzzy matching (657 matched so far)...
#> ✔ Matched 657/919 data names to tree tips
out_dir <- tempfile("export_")
files <- reconcile_export(result,
                          data = avonet_subset, tree = tree_jetz,
                          species_col = "Species1",
                          dir = out_dir, prefix = "avonet_jetz")
#> ! Dropped 262 rows with unresolved species from data
#> ℹ Tree has 657 tips after alignment
#> ✔ Data written to /var/folders/7x/ytfpq14s0v18frbm9v_w9f4c0000gq/T//RtmpcRVU7C/export_ca01186e8a3d/avonet_jetz_data.csv
#> ✔ Tree written to /var/folders/7x/ytfpq14s0v18frbm9v_w9f4c0000gq/T//RtmpcRVU7C/export_ca01186e8a3d/avonet_jetz_tree.nex
#> ✔ Mapping written to /var/folders/7x/ytfpq14s0v18frbm9v_w9f4c0000gq/T//RtmpcRVU7C/export_ca01186e8a3d/avonet_jetz_mapping.csv
files$data     # path to CSV
#> [1] "/var/folders/7x/ytfpq14s0v18frbm9v_w9f4c0000gq/T//RtmpcRVU7C/export_ca01186e8a3d/avonet_jetz_data.csv"
files$tree     # path to Nexus tree
#> [1] "/var/folders/7x/ytfpq14s0v18frbm9v_w9f4c0000gq/T//RtmpcRVU7C/export_ca01186e8a3d/avonet_jetz_tree.nex"
files$mapping  # path to mapping CSV
#> [1] "/var/folders/7x/ytfpq14s0v18frbm9v_w9f4c0000gq/T//RtmpcRVU7C/export_ca01186e8a3d/avonet_jetz_mapping.csv"
unlink(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)  # clean up
